overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, exploring a dense cyberpunk urban environment at night. The player traverses elevated walkways, indoor corridors, and rooftop terraces illuminated by vibrant neon signage and massive holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated exterior walkway with corrugated metal roofing

events.description: moves from open rooftop edge to covered metal walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated exterior walkways, observing the neon-lit street below

entered.detail: rusted corrugated metal roofing on elevated structure
street below illuminated by colorful neon signs and building lights
metal grating walkway with corrugated texture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated exterior walkway at night, with corrugated metal roofing overhead and neon-lit streets visible below. The camera moves forward along the metal grating, transitioning from an open edge to a more covered section of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor residential corridor with vending machines

events.description: enters indoor space from exterior walkway, passing through doorway
moves from dim exterior to brightly lit interior with overhead spotlights

agents.ego_description: entering a building and moving through narrow corridors with vending machines and scattered debris

entered.detail: bright red vending machine with illuminated display
tall purple storage locker with yellow stripe
metal storage shelves with various items
dark red blood stains on concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The player enters an indoor residential area featuring a red vending machine and purple locker against the wall. Blood stains mark the concrete floor as the camera moves through dimly lit corridors with metal shelving and scattered boxes, transitioning from the exterior neon glow to artificial interior lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market courtyard with makeshift stalls

events.description: exits narrow corridor into more open courtyard area with market stalls
passes by seated NPCs near wooden pallets and tool chests

agents.ego_description: navigating through a cluttered market courtyard with tool chests and makeshift structures

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on the ground near wooden pallets, appearing to rest

entered.detail: large orange rolling tool chest with multiple drawers
blue fabric canopy over market stall
metal barricade fencing with vertical bars
traditional red paper lanterns hanging from structure

segments.scene_description: Moving into a semi-covered market courtyard, the scene features an orange tool chest in the center and a blue canopy overhead. Two NPCs sit near wooden pallets on the left, while red lanterns glow in the distance. The environment mixes corrugated metal walls with open sections showing the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit corridor with arcade signage

events.description: enters narrow corridor with intense pink and blue neon illumination
moves from tight corridor to slightly wider area with red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow corridors lined with bright neon arcade signs and vending machines

entered.detail: bright illuminated signs including 'BIG' in large letters
large illuminated poster with 'WET DREAM' text
pink neon sign with monkey logo and 'SPUNKY MONKEY' text

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow corridor bathed in vibrant pink and blue neon light from arcade signs and advertisements. A prominent 'SPUNKY MONKEY' sign glows on the left, while a 'WET DREAM' poster illuminates the far end. The tight space features corrugated metal walls and scattered vending machines.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop terrace overlooking cyberpunk cityscape with holographic billboards

events.description: emerges from narrow corridor onto wide open rooftop with panoramic city views
exposed to massive holographic billboard illumination from all directions

agents.ego_description: walking along rooftop terrace, panning to view the massive holographic advertisements and city skyline

entered.detail: giant floating digital advertisements covering building facades
large pink neon sign with 'TENGU' text on building
large industrial metal arch spanning across the rooftop area
dense cluster of skyscrapers with illuminated windows and signs

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto a wide rooftop terrace, the scene opens up to reveal a breathtaking cyberpunk cityscape covered in massive holographic billboards. A large metal arch structure spans overhead while the 'TENGU' sign glows pink on the right. The camera pans across the panoramic view of illuminated skyscrapers and floating advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stairwell and narrow walkways descending through building levels

events.description: leaves open rooftop and enters dark enclosed stairwell
lighting dims significantly as descending into lower building levels with only neon accents visible
reaches bottom of stairs and transitions to ground level alley

agents.ego_description: descending multiple levels of metal staircases through dark narrow shafts, eventually reaching a ground level alley

entered.detail: metal grate stairs with railings descending through building
large air conditioning and ventilation units mounted on walls
narrow alley at ground level with debris and market umbrella

segments.scene_description: The player descends into a dark stairwell, leaving the bright rooftop behind. Metal grating stairs wind downward through narrow shafts with corrugated metal walls and occasional neon light filtering through. The descent continues past ventilation units until reaching a ground level alley with scattered debris and a green neon light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated urban walkway through a series of claustrophobic interior spaces, eventually peaking on a panoramic rooftop before descending into a dark alley. It begins by moving along a metal grating walkway under corrugated roofing, transitioning from the open night air into a dimly lit residential corridor marked by blood-stained concrete and artificial lighting. The camera then shifts into a semi-covered market courtyard with blue canopies and glowing red lanterns before squeezing through a narrow corridor saturated in vibrant pink and blue neon from arcade signs. This tight space suddenly opens up onto a wide rooftop terrace, revealing a breathtaking cityscape of massive holographic billboards and illuminated skyscrapers under a glowing pink Tengu sign. Finally, the perspective plunges away from the skyline, winding down a dark metal stairwell past ventilation units until it reaches a debris-strewn ground-level alley bathed in green neon.
